description: Composition White jersey for men made of 100% polyester and Dri-Fit fabric, has a Johnny collar, short raglan sleeves and nike tag embroidered on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The polyester material keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
